response.global_analysis: The video features a multi-member performance of 'START AGAIN' by hololive English, followed by a solo performance of 'Seishoujo Ryouiki' by IRyS. No reference lyrics were provided in the JSON for the first song, so I transcribed the English and Japanese vocals using the audio as the ground truth, cross-referencing with on-screen stylized text where available. For 'Seishoujo Ryouiki', I matched the audio to the known lyrics. Timing is strictly tied to the vocal bursts, and long sentences have been split to ensure readability and compliance with character limits while maintaining semantic continuity.
